organization.name: Neovo
organization.description: Neovo is a Switzerland-based software and IT services company specializing in custom web development, web applications, and system integration. Founded in 2025, the company focuses on building sustainable, high-quality digital solutions that integrate seamlessly with existing business processes. Its expertise includes SAP Fiori/UI5, modern web technologies, and end-to-end delivery from consulting and architecture to implementation and maintenance.
